features.description: root_cause field on Finding and _root_cause_for() enrichment in agent_tasks.py
features.motivation: Field-test evidence showed agents fix symptoms rather than causes; adding the proximate cause reduces recurrence rate of agent-applied fixes

features.description: drift status UX improvements: spinner, baseline delta, clean output, profile-fallback warning
changes: Animated spinner during analysis when stdout is a terminal
Profile-not-found warning printed before vibe-coding fallback
Clean output: 'No issues found' → '✓ Clean – N files / M signals checked'
Baseline delta line appended to score (green if improved, dim otherwise)

self_analysis.note: Tests pass (tests/test_agent_native_cli.py, tests/test_guided_mode.py, full suite); ADR-075 present at docs/decisions/

patch_writer.description: PatchWriter ABC + auto-apply for add_docstring and add_guard_clause via libcst. Auto-apply requires automation_fit=HIGH + change_scope=LOCAL + review_risk=LOW.

eds_dampening.description: EDS raised threshold for private micro-helpers (<5 lines, <3 params, single-underscore prefix) to reduce false positives.
